use_cases: Animated hero section text that reveals on scroll for engagement
Product feature descriptions with staggered text animation effects
Testimonials and quotes with smooth reveal animations
Landing page headlines with blur-to-clear text animation
Section titles with GSAP-powered scale and position effects
ai_summary: GSAP-powered text reveal component with 7 animation effects including revealX, revealY, scale and blur transitions. Supports word/character splitting with configurable duration, stagger, and animation timing for smooth entrance effects.
